title: EC Blue Glass Triptych
html_prompt: Create a responsive single-file HTML/CSS/JS preview with no external assets, no CDN, and no frameworks. Recreate a three-panel EC LAB poster/gallery layout on a soft gray page: tall 9:16 cards with deep cobalt blue and white blurred radial fields, glassmorphism pill labels, abstract silhouette-like blue blur forms, minimal EC LAB / ec 的实验室 identity, and small navigation text for Visual Notes, AI Workflow, Design, Prompt, Code, Inspiration, and Reusable Assets. Build all visual elements with HTML, CSS, inline SVG, gradients, blur filters, shadows, backdrop-filter, pseudo-elements, and text. Preserve the final design structure, spacing, proportions, color temperature, soft texture, and restrained typography hierarchy. Use only EC font sets and EC radius tokens.

css.--font-sans: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif
css.--font-cn: "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", "Noto Sans SC", system-ui, sans-serif
